headline: KLA (KLAC) Stock Seems Fairly Valued Following Fresh AI Demand News
summary: KLA stock has delivered a very large 606.8% return over the past five years, yet its low overall value score and recent pullback raise the question of whether the current price still leaves enough room for comfort. The roughly 7x five year return means anyone who has held KLA through this period has been strongly rewarded, which can make fresh entry points harder to judge. Investor attention around KLA’s role in AI focused chip production can support high expectations, while sector wide...
